overall.description: Nighttime maritime navigation simulation from the bridge of a motor yacht. The vessel moves steadily through calm waters while the operator monitors active radar and navigation displays. The scene features persistent artificial lighting from the instrument panels against the dark night environment.

events.description: slight port-side turn brings stanchion into view temporarily
another course adjustment makes port stanchion visible again

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, monitoring the rotating radar sweep and navigation charts while maintaining course through calm nighttime waters

entered.detail: left navigation monitor displaying chart data with cyan and red graphics
center radar screen with rotating yellow sweep and circular range rings
right monitor showing depth profile with blue water column
white illuminated bow deck of the vessel visible through the bridge window
left structural frame of the bridge window
right structural frame of the bridge window
dark water visible beyond the bow with subtle wave movement

segments.scene_description: The vessel navigates through calm waters at night from an enclosed bridge perspective. Three illuminated navigation monitors dominate the upper view while the bow cuts through dark water ahead. The radar sweep rotates continuously, and occasional structural elements of the bridge come into view during subtle course adjustments.

segments_errors: segment[0]: 首段 changed 应为空

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous perspective from an enclosed bridge as a motor yacht navigates through a dark, calm maritime environment. It begins with a focus on the bow cutting through the black water, framed by the interior structural elements of the bridge. As the vessel maintains its steady course, the view emphasizes the glow of three illuminated navigation monitors that dominate the upper field of vision. The scene then centers on the rhythmic, rotating sweep of the radar display, which provides a constant point of light against the surrounding nighttime void.
